Prashant Pandey

I am a Staff Engineer at Harness Inc., where I work on the core data platform that enables Traceable's (now merged with Harness) core observability plaform. Previously, at Startree Inc., I drove key initiatives in Apache Pinot, including Graviton readiness, row and column-level authorization, live-cluster migration tooling, and observability enhancements, while actively contributing to open-source. My career has focused on building massively concurrent, distributed, and cost-efficient systems that scale to millions of events per second and enable data-driven applications. If you’d like to discuss real-time data systems, distributed infrastructure, or open-source collaboration, you can reach me at pandepra1 [at] outlook [dot] com.
